title: cstack swarm configuration
description: Configuration for cstack swarm mode. All fields are optional — defaults apply for anything not specified.

models.description: Override the AI models used for coordinator, workers, and scout passes.

coordinator.description: Model for the swarm coordinator agent.

scout.description: Model for read-only scout pass (test domain detection).

limits.description: Limits on swarm size and output.

max_workers.description: Hard cap on number of workers. N in :swarm:N is capped at this value.

summary_tokens.description: Maximum tokens each worker returns in its summary to the coordinator.

location.description: Where to install skill and agent files.
